name: Anatomy Viewer
description: Interactive component breakdown with numbered hotspots on visual preview, component list, atoms used, and code signatures. Used for pattern documentation and education.

split.description: Two-column layout: visual preview with hotspots (left), breakdown panel (right)

slots.preview: Visual pattern preview with numbered hotspot overlays
slots.component-list: List of all components in pattern with selection state
slots.detail-panel: Selected component details: name, code signature, atoms used

slots.preview: Visual pattern preview with numbered hotspot overlays
